free_text: Level densities of 28Al,29Si and 41Ca inferred from
fluctuation measurement
The data were acquired at the WNR
facility at the LANL. A beam of 800 MeV protons
produced neutrons over the range from keV to nearly
800 MeV by spallation reaction.
Analytic dead time correction for lower probability
to detect low energy neutrons. Correction factor was
up to 1.7.
neutrons produced by spallation reaction of
800 MeV protons on tungsten target
No information on uncertainty
Compiled by S.H.
Based on the same experiment as entry
13569, but with full experimental energy resolution
Data taken from Fig.1 of the reference
